data.title: The total amount of Bitcoin held by listed companies worldwide exceeds 1 million
data.description: BitcoinTreasuries published an article on the X platform stating that the total amount of Bitcoin held by listed companies worldwide has exceeded 1 million, reaching 1,000,442. Strategy currently ranks first, holding 636,505 Bitcoins.

data.title: Binance Alpha now lists TRADOOR
data.description: According to the official website, Binance Alpha has launched TRADOOR. Contract address: 0x9123400446a56176eb1b6be9ee5cf703e409f492

data.title: Infinity Ground receives official support from Aptos and will promote the full-link "Prompt → Move dApp" experience
data.description: Infinity Ground's Agentic IDE has been fully integrated with the Aptos network, officially supporting the development of decentralized applications (dApps) based on the Move language ecosystem and receiving official support from Aptos. Together, they will enable developers to rapidly generate, refine, and deploy Move contracts and application prototypes using natural language within an intelligent development environment. Leveraging Aptos' advantages in high performance, public chain security, and stability, users can enjoy an efficient and seamless AI-driven development experience within the Infinity Agentic IDE, whether building games, social networks, or DeFi applications. As the Vibe Coding infrastructure for Web 3, Infinity Ground is committed to lowering the barrier to entry for application development, enabling anyone to develop and deploy dApps on-chain using natural language. Infinity Ground already offers full support for the EVM system, and this official collaboration with Aptos will further help developers and users build, distribute, and utilize applications within the MoveVM system, accelerating the scale-up of Web 3 applications.

data.title: RWA Layer2 Zyra Network will soon open participation channels
data.description: Official news: Zyra, a Layer 2 project focused on RWA and Depository (Debit Card) platforms, will open its network to early community members at 8:00 PM (UTC+8) on September 4th. According to the official introduction, Zyra is committed to building an on-chain credit infrastructure driven by ordinary users, focusing on on-chain access for high-yield debt, structured assets, and real-world returns. The project utilizes a multi-node verification architecture and incorporates an intelligent credit scoring mechanism, aiming to provide more robust asset support for Web 3 finance.

data.title: Digital asset management company Bitwise has launched five crypto ETPs in Switzerland, covering BTC, ETH, XRP, SOL, etc.
data.description: Digital asset management company Bitwise has announced the listing of five cryptocurrency ETPs on the Six Swiss Exchange. These include the Bitwise Core Bitcoin ETP, the Bitwise Ethereum Staking ETP, the Bitwise Solana Staking ETP, the Bitwise Physical XRP ETP, and the Bitwise MSCI Digital Assets Select 20 ETP. This brings the total number of cryptocurrency ETPs Bitwise has listed on the Six Swiss Exchange to ten. (Globenewswire)

data.title: BlackRock deposited 33,884 ETH to Coinbase Prime 2 hours ago
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 2 hours ago, BlackRock deposited 33,884 ETH worth $148.6 million to Coinbase Prime.

data.title: DDC Enterprise's semi-annual results report: Reaffirms its target Bitcoin holdings of 10,000 this year, with a return of 1,798% to date.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed DDC Enterprise Limited released its unaudited six-month financial results for the period ending June 30, 2025. The results indicate that since its initial Bitcoin purchase in late May, its holdings reached 1,008 as of the end of August, with a return of 1,798% year-to-date and a current profit of $3.8 million. The company also reiterated its target of 10,000 Bitcoin holdings for the year, aiming to become one of the top three Bitcoin asset managers globally within three years. (Businesswire)

data.title: Bitget's on-chain trading volume hit a new high, exceeding $31 million in a single day.
data.description: Bitget's on-chain trading sector saw $31 million in trading volume yesterday, a record high. Third-party data indicates that Binance Alpha's daily trading volume during the same period was approximately $77.5 million, accounting for approximately 40% of its average daily trading volume. Bitget's on-chain trading sector reportedly launched over 100 US stock tokens supported by Ondo yesterday, including stocks of well-known companies such as Apple, Tesla, Microsoft, Amazon, and Nvidia, as well as major index funds. Bitget also supports direct on-chain trading of US stocks on centralized exchanges using USDC.

data.title: China's Financial Development: The public chain SimpleChain 2.0 official website and test network are now online
data.description: According to an announcement from the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, China Financial Development Co., Ltd., a Hong Kong-listed company, announced the launch of its SimpleChain 2.0 public blockchain registration website, user account activation, the launch of the SimpleChain 2.0 official website, and the launch of the testnet. Furthermore, China Financial Development Co., Ltd. stated its plans to launch a next-generation on-chain asset platform, exploring three-tier token markets in mainland China, Hong Kong, and internationally.

data.title: White Star Capital's fund raises $25 million, targeting $50 million
data.description: Venture capital firm White Star Capital announced that its fund has completed its first round of funding, with $25 million led by Fonds de solidarité FTQ, with a target of $50 million. White Star Capital currently manages an early-stage growth fund and a digital asset fund focused on crypto and blockchain startups. In February of this year, it participated in the Series A funding round of Lockchain.ai, an AI-powered blockchain risk management platform. It has previously invested in crypto lending platforms Ledn and Trident Digital Group, crypto payment solutions provider BoomFi, decentralized finance company Thala Labs, and cryptocurrency index protocol Index Coop. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Justin Sun transferred 50 million WLFI to a new wallet and may deposit it into HTX
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, Justin Sun transferred 50 million WLFI to a new wallet or deposited it into HTX, worth US$9.12 million.

data.title: Two Prime Launches Zero-Interest OID Loans for Institutional Bitcoin Holders
data.description: Digital asset derivatives company Two Prime announced the launch of zero-interest Original Issue Discount (OID) loans to institutional Bitcoin holders through its secured lending affiliate, Two Prime Lending Limited. This service reportedly eliminates the need for businesses to liquidate Bitcoin or use cash reserves, maximizing capital efficiency. Current asset custodians include Fidelity, Anchorage, and Bitgo. (Businesswire)

data.title: SEC Unveils Spring 2025 Regulatory Agenda for Crypto Assets
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has released its Spring 2025 regulatory agenda, which includes potential rule proposals related to the issuance and trading of crypto assets. The agenda aims to clarify the regulatory framework for crypto assets and provide greater certainty to the market.

SEC Chairman Paul S. Atkins emphasized that a key task during his tenure is to define the rules for the issuance, custody, and trading of crypto assets while continuing to prevent misconduct. The report also outlines a series of proposed regulatory relaxations intended to reduce compliance burdens and facilitate capital formation. These proposals include simplifying financing pathways and improving investor access to private enterprises.

Additionally, the report discusses revising existing rules to enhance their effectiveness and modernity, addressing issues related to information disclosure burdens.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 4,400 USDT with a Narrowed 0.82% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Sep 04, 2025, 12:34 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 4,400 USDT and is now trading at 4,397.439941 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.82% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Grayscale Launches Ethereum Covered Call Options ETF
data.description: According to Foresight News, Grayscale has announced the introduction of the Grayscale Ethereum Covered Call Options ETF, with the stock code ETCO. This ETF offers a covered call options strategy designed to enable investors to potentially benefit from Ethereum's volatility.

data.title: Trend Research Continues to Reduce NEIROETH Holdings
data.description:
According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, Trend Research has been actively reducing its NEIROETH holdings. Recently, the firm transferred NEIROETH worth $18.09 million to a centralized exchange (CEX).

In the last 10 minutes, Trend Research deposited an additional 134 million NEIROETH, valued at $8.24 million, to a CEX using three different addresses. This activity indicates a continued strategy of offloading NEIROETH assets.

data.title: Ripple Expands RLUSD Into Africa Targeting Institutional Rails
data.description:
Ripple has been making strides toward expanding its services across the cryptocurrency and fintech worlds following the conclusion of its legal battle with the SEC. The network just announced another major development aimed at boosting the RLUSD stablecoin adoption. Ripple just announced that it is expanding RLUSD support in Africa through multiple partnerships
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/09/04/ripple-expands-rlusd-into-africa-targeting-institutional-rails/

data.title: Mantle 2.0 to accelerate DeFi-CeFi convergence: Delphi Digital
data.description:
Mantle’s growing utility within the Bybit exchange’s ecosystem may inspire a new wave of convergence between the industry’s decentralized and centralized stakeholders.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/mantle-2-0-new-meta-defi-cefi-convergence?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: NEIROETH fell below 0.06 USDT, with a 24-hour drop of 23.78%.
data.description: Market data shows that NEIROETH has fallen below 0.06 USDT, currently trading at 0.05972 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 23.78%. Earlier news broke that two Trend Research addresses deposited a total of 77.9 million NEIRO tokens, valued at $6.04 million, into Bybit this morning. Bybit recently announced the delisting of NEIROETH.
